ddls:
CREATE TABLE "process_data" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "process_phase_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the process phase */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment used in the process */,
  "setpoint_force" REAL /* Setpoint force for the process */,
  "act_force" REAL /* Actual force during the process */,
  "act_shortening" REAL /* Actual shortening during the process */,
  "act_feed_z1" REAL /* Actual feed z1 during the process */,
  "act_rotation" REAL /* Actual rotation during the process */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the process */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the process */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the data was collected */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_data_process_phase_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_phase_id") REFERENCES process_phases ("process_phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_data_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_phases" (
  "process_phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process phase */,
  "process_phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the process phase */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the process phase */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the process phase */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the process phase was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the process phase was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "setpoints" (
  "setpoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setpoint */,
  "process_phase_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the process phase */,
  "setpoint_force" REAL /* Setpoint force for the process */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setpoint */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setpoint was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setpoint was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_setpoints_process_phase_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_phase_id") REFERENCES process_phases ("process_phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the equipment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the equipment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the equipment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, engineer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "process_phase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process phase being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the process phase */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the process phase was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_process_phase_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_phase_id") REFERENCES process_phases ("process_phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "process_phase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process phase */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trend */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trend */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trend was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trend was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_trends_process_phase_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_phase_id") REFERENCES process_phases ("process_phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "process_phase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process phase */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_process_phase_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_phase_id") REFERENCES process_phases ("process_phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "process_phase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process phase */,
  "doc_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "doc_file" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_process_phase_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_phase_id") REFERENCES process_phases ("process_phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
